audio_system: Web Audio API (Procedural - No External Files)

sounds.trigger_event: User hovers over interactive elements (links, cards)
sounds.description: Subspace frequency blip - quick, subtle hover feedback. Very short, non-intrusive.
sounds.frequency: very frequent (on every nav item/card hover)

replacement_guidelines.notes: Should feel like NASA control panel subtle feedback, not intrusive

sounds.trigger_event: User clicks buttons, UI elements, navigation items
sounds.waveform_composition: Triangle oscillator (720→540Hz) + noise burst (4200Hz bandpass) + sine tail (1320→1140Hz)
sounds.description: Sharp console keypress sound with attack transient and resonant tail. Punchy, clear feedback.

replacement_guidelines.notes: Most frequent sound - should be satisfying but not annoying. NASA mission control aesthetic.

sounds.trigger_event: User selects/changes modes (CIN/SCI mode toggle, timescale selection)
sounds.description: Lighter variant of click for tab/mode switching. More musical, less percussive.
sounds.overlap: not typically (mode changes are discrete events)

replacement_guidelines.notes: Should feel like switching between space observation modes (confirmation of state change)

sounds.description: Very quick tick for sidebar tab changes. Quick, punchy, minimal.

replacement_guidelines.notes: Brief confirmation of tab switch - should not be intrusive

sounds.trigger_event: Page transitions, route changes, hero section load
sounds.waveform_composition: 8-step digital scramble: alternating noise bursts and pitch steps (freqs: 2400, 800, 3200, 600, 2800, 1200, 3600, 400 Hz)
sounds.description: Digital scramble effect with pitch steps and noise. Dramatic transition effect.
sounds.volume_control: dynamic (volume decreases across steps, MASTER_VOL * 0.8 max)

replacement_guidelines.notes: Marks page boundaries - should feel like digital system transition, not jarring

used_in_files: Not currently mapped in grep results - may be in dynamic code or unused
sounds.trigger_event: Potential: Major modal opens, significant state change (UNUSED/POTENTIAL)
sounds.waveform_composition: 3-layer: (1) Rise glitch (240→960Hz triangle), (2) Space whoosh (700→5200Hz bandpass noise sweep), (3) Clean confirm tone (1280→1520Hz sine)
sounds.description: Glitch scramble → whoosh → clean. Major transition sound for significant state changes.
sounds.frequency: rare (would be for major transitions only)
sounds.status: DEFINED BUT UNUSED - Candidate for implementation

replacement_guidelines.notes: Should feel like system breaking through interference to clear signal

sounds.file_type: Procedural (Web Audio API - CRT Power-on Simulation)
sounds.trigger_event: Terminal component mounts, Space Tracker modal opens, app boot sequence
sounds.waveform_composition: Multi-layer boot simulation: Sub rumble (46→62Hz sine), Pitch lift (120→1480Hz triangle), 3 digital handshake tones (780/1040/1320Hz), Confirm tone (1760→1960Hz)
sounds.description: CRT power-on simulator. Sub rumble, pitch ramp, digital handshake. Complex, cinematic.

replacement_guidelines.notes: Should feel like powering up a NASA control system, not a video game

sounds.trigger_event: After boot sequence completes, system ready confirmation
sounds.waveform_composition: Two ascending tones: 880Hz (80ms) → 1320Hz (100ms), clean dual-tone comms confirm
sounds.description: Clean dual-tone confirmation. Not video-gamey. Professional comms aesthetic.

replacement_guidelines.notes: Should feel like mission control confirmation, clean and professional

used_in_files: Not currently mapped in grep results - may be unused or dynamic
sounds.waveform_composition: Digital packet burst: 4 fast frequency steps (980→1240→1480→1720Hz) with triangle osc + noise gate
sounds.description: Fast freq steps with noise gate. Digital packet simulation.
sounds.frequency: would be frequent (if triggered on data updates)
sounds.status: DEFINED BUT UNUSED - Candidate for telemetry sounds

replacement_guidelines.notes: Could enhance space tracker data telemetry updates

used_in_files: SpaceTrackerModal.tsx (playSound('ping') when clicking to focus on Sun)
sounds.trigger_event: User clicks to focus camera on celestial bodies in space tracker
sounds.waveform_composition: Deep-space sonar: Core sine (1080→900Hz) + overtone (2160→1800Hz triangle) + echo (980→820Hz sine, delayed 180ms)
sounds.description: Deep-space sonar effect. Fundamental + overtone + echo. Exploration/detection feel.

replacement_guidelines.notes: Should feel like probing space, discovering objects - scientific, not sci-fi dramatic

used_in_files: AmbientSound.tsx (startAmbient() triggered on first user interaction)
sounds.trigger_event: First user interaction (click/key/touch) - starts background ambient loop
sounds.waveform_composition: Complex layered: (1) Sub-bass drone 40Hz+41.1Hz (beat effect), (2) Mid hum 120Hz sawtooth→lowpass filtered, (3) Slow LFO tremolo (0.07Hz), (4) High-freq shimmer (4800Hz bandpass with 0.03Hz LFO)
sounds.description: Dark cinematic terminal aesthetic. Multi-layer ambient drone. Loops indefinitely.
sounds.frequency: continuous (runs once started, until stopAmbient() called)
sounds.notes: Respects localStorage toggle (STORAGE_KEY: 'tp-sound'). Can be stopped via stopAmbient().

replacement_guidelines.notes: Creates dark, professional sci-fi atmosphere. Should feel like spacecraft life support systems, not intrusive

used_in_files: Not currently mapped in grep results - likely unused but integrated in 'transition' sound
sounds.trigger_event: Potential: Page transitions, modal opens (PARTIAL - may be called by 'transition')
sounds.waveform_composition: 3-layer noise sweep: (1) Low freq whoosh (200→600Hz, 0-0.35s), (2) High freq shimmer (2000→6000Hz, delayed 40ms), (3) Sub tail thump (80→30Hz sine, 0-120ms)
sounds.description: Cinema quality sweep with three layers and doppler feel. Cinematic but subtle.

replacement_guidelines.notes: Should feel like spaceship acceleration or portal transit, professional and polished

used_in_files: Not currently mapped in grep results - likely unused but available
sounds.trigger_event: Potential: Error states, warnings, important notifications (UNUSED/CANDIDATE)
sounds.waveform_composition: Urgent stutter pulse: 3 pulses of dual-tone chord (660Hz fundamental + 928Hz tritone for tension)
sounds.description: Military tonal alert. Urgent stutter pulse. Not video-gamey. Professional warning.
sounds.status: DEFINED BUT UNUSED - Candidate for error/warning states

replacement_guidelines.notes: Should signal importance without being harsh - professional alert aesthetic

sounds.trigger_event: User answers quiz question correctly in globe quiz
sounds.waveform_composition: Clean ascending two-tone: 523Hz (90ms) → 784Hz (100ms), simple and clear
sounds.description: Clean ascending confirmation. Professional, not gamey. Reinforces positive feedback.
sounds.overlap: not typically (one answer at a time)

replacement_guidelines.notes: Should feel rewarding but not arcade-like - educational game aesthetic

sounds.trigger_event: User answers quiz question incorrectly in globe quiz
sounds.waveform_composition: Descending error: Filtered sawtooth (400→180Hz) + noise burst (600Hz bandpass at start)
sounds.description: Descending glide with error character. Signals incorrect answer. Not harsh.
sounds.overlap: not typically (one answer at a time)

replacement_guidelines.notes: Should indicate error without being harsh or demotivating - educational game aesthetic

missing_opportunities.current: No sound on article card image hover

Could ping on any body focus or detection

redundancies.context: click is overused for all buttons, select only used for specific modes
redundancies.recommendation: Differentiate usage more clearly or unify

unused_assets.recommendation: Implement for major modal opens or state changes
Use for telemetry updates or data loads in space tracker
Implement for error states and validation failures
Use for major transitions (currently included in 'transition')
Remove if unused, or integrate into space features
Remove if unused, or integrate into space features
Remove if unused, or integrate into space features

professional_audio_redesign_notes.current_state: Professional procedural Web Audio API system. Dark cinematic aesthetic. No external dependencies.
strengths: Lightweight - no audio files needed for core sounds
Responsive - true Web Audio API with real-time synthesis
Themetically consistent - sci-fi/NASA control room aesthetic
Customizable - each sound can be tweaked in code
Accessibility - sounds can be toggled via localStorage
improvement_opportunities: Replace procedural sounds with high-quality AI-generated audio (maintain same timings + contexts)
Implement the 4 unused but defined sounds (transition, dataStream, alert, whoosh)
Integrate orphaned Jupiter/Solar audio files or remove them
Add sound feedback to currently silent interactions (article hovers, data loads, errors)
Create better differentiation between similar sounds (click vs select)
Implement volume ducking for ambient when other sounds play
Add sound preference profiles (minimal, normal, theatrical)
Consider spatial audio for space tracker context

replacement_strategy.approach: 1:1 replacement - maintain exact timings and triggers, replace waveforms with AI-generated audio
replacement_strategy.audio_generation: Use text-to-speech or AI audio generation to create high-quality sci-fi sounds
replacement_strategy.testing: Ensure trigger timing and overlap handling remains identical
replacement_strategy.rollback: Simple - revert to sounds.ts if needed
